user_instruction: Use Aureon repo to log in, complete, and apply for grants.

browser_result.handoff: Chrome tab left open at IFS sign-in form for human account completion

blocked_by: IFS account password/sign-in required; no plaintext password was available or requested in chat
Route requires Swiss implementation partner evidence and research institute or waiver evidence before truthful completion/submission
next_human_actions: Complete sign-in in the open Chrome IFS tab using the intended account
Confirm or create the R&A Consulting organisation profile in IFS
Provide named Swiss implementation partner evidence
Provide named research institute evidence or documented waiver condition
Then use the portal-ready text pack to populate draft sections
controls: No password, MFA code, CAPTCHA, or provider control bypass attempted
No account creation, partner invitation, file upload, email send, Drive upload, or final submission attempted
No plaintext secret read or stored
Submitted IFS and AIRR application records were preserved unchanged
